homepage.heroSubline: Durable concrete solutions built to last. Serving Bakersfield and Kern County for over a decade.
aboutText: Total Concrete Services, INC started with a simple mission: to provide reliable, high-quality concrete work to the Bakersfield community. Founded by lifelong Kern County residents, we understand the unique challenges our climate and soil present.

We believe in doing the job right the first time. Our experienced team combines time-tested techniques with modern equipment to ensure every project meets our rigorous standards. We prioritize clear communication, meticulous planning, and unwavering dedication to customer satisfaction.

We're proud to be a part of the Bakersfield community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact. Our commitment extends beyond concrete; we're invested in building a stronger, more sustainable future for Kern County.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand Bakersfield's soil and climate, ensuring lasting results.

valueProps.title: Quality Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: Experienced professionals dedicated to exceeding expectations.

valueProps.title: Reliable Service
valueProps.description: On-time project completion and clear communication every step of the way.

valueProps.title: Comprehensive Solutions
valueProps.description: From foundations to decorative concrete, we handle it all.

homepage.ctaSubline: Let's discuss your project needs and provide a tailored solution.

services.name: Concrete Foundations
services.shortDescription: Solid foundations for residential and commercial structures.
services.description: A strong foundation is the bedrock of any successful construction project. At Total Concrete Services, INC, we specialize in pouring durable and reliable concrete foundations for homes, businesses, and industrial facilities throughout Bakersfield. We understand the unique soil conditions in Kern County and implement proven techniques to ensure long-lasting stability. Our team meticulously prepares the site, precisely forms the concrete, and uses high-quality mixes designed to withstand the extreme summer heat and occasional seismic activity. Whether it's a new construction project in Seven Oaks or a foundation repair in Oleander-Sunset, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results. We handle everything from initial excavation and rebar installation to the final pour and curing process, adhering to strict building codes and safety standards. Trust us to lay the groundwork for your project's success.
benefits: Protection against soil movement and seismic activity

faq.question: How long does it take to pour a concrete foundation?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the project. Generally, it takes 1-3 days for smaller residential foundations and longer for larger commercial structures. We'll provide a detailed schedule during the initial consultation.

faq.question: What type of concrete mix do you use for foundations?
faq.answer: We use high-strength concrete mixes specifically designed for foundation applications. These mixes are resistant to cracking and provide superior load-bearing capacity. We adjust the mix based on the specific soil conditions and project requirements.

faq.question: Do you offer foundation repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive foundation repair services, including crack repair, leveling, and underpinning. We'll assess the damage and recommend the most effective solution to restore the structural integrity of your foundation.

services.name: Driveways & Patios
services.shortDescription: Enhance your property with beautiful and durable concrete driveways and patios.
services.description: Upgrade your outdoor living space with a custom concrete driveway or patio from Total Concrete Services, INC. We specialize in creating durable, aesthetically pleasing surfaces that withstand Bakersfield's harsh climate. From classic broom-finished driveways to decorative stamped concrete patios, we offer a wide range of design options to complement your home's architecture. We use high-quality concrete mixes and proven construction techniques to ensure long-lasting performance. Whether you're looking to add curb appeal to your Riviera/Westchester home or create a relaxing outdoor oasis in your backyard, we can bring your vision to life. We handle every aspect of the project, from site preparation and grading to concrete pouring and finishing. Our team is committed to providing exceptional craftsmanship and outstanding customer service. Let us transform your driveway or patio into a functional and beautiful extension of your home.
benefits: Increased curb appeal and property value
Custom designs to match your style

faq.question: How much does a concrete driveway or patio cost?
faq.answer: The cost varies depending on the size, design, and complexity of the project. We offer free estimates and will provide a detailed breakdown of all costs involved.

faq.question: What types of decorative concrete finishes do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a variety of decorative finishes, including stamped concrete, exposed aggregate, and colored concrete. We can help you choose the perfect finish to achieve your desired look.

faq.question: How long will my new concrete driveway or patio last?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, a concrete driveway or patio can last for 25 years or more. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure long-lasting performance.

services.name: Concrete Slabs
services.shortDescription: Durable and level concrete slabs for sheds, garages, and more.
services.description: Need a solid foundation for your shed, garage, or workshop? Total Concrete Services, INC specializes in pouring level and durable concrete slabs throughout Bakersfield. We understand the importance of a properly prepared base to prevent cracking and settling. Our team meticulously grades the site, compacts the soil, and installs a reinforced concrete slab that will withstand heavy loads and extreme temperatures. Whether you're building a new storage shed in Oleander-Sunset or adding a garage to your Seven Oaks home, we can provide a concrete slab that meets your specific needs. We use high-quality concrete mixes and precise finishing techniques to ensure a smooth, level surface. Our experienced team is committed to providing exceptional craftsmanship and outstanding customer service. Let us provide the solid foundation you need for your next project.
benefits: Protection against soil movement and settling

faq.question: How thick should a concrete slab be?
faq.answer: The required thickness depends on the intended use of the slab. For sheds and light-duty applications, a 4-inch slab is typically sufficient. For garages and heavier loads, a 6-inch or thicker slab may be required.

faq.question: Do you offer concrete slab repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer concrete slab repair services, including crack repair, leveling, and patching. We'll assess the damage and recommend the most effective solution to restore the slab's integrity.

faq.question: How long does it take to pour a concrete slab?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the project. Generally, it takes 1-2 days for smaller slabs and longer for larger projects. We'll provide a detailed schedule during the initial consultation.

services.name: Concrete Repairs
services.shortDescription: Expert concrete repair services to restore the integrity of your surfaces.
services.description: Cracked, chipped, or damaged concrete can be unsightly and compromise the structural integrity of your property. Total Concrete Services, INC provides expert concrete repair services throughout Bakersfield to restore your surfaces to their former glory. We specialize in repairing driveways, patios, sidewalks, foundations, and more. Our team uses high-quality patching materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and long-lasting repair. Whether you have a minor crack in your driveway in Riviera/Westchester or a major structural issue in your foundation, we can provide a cost-effective solution. We understand the importance of addressing concrete repairs promptly to prevent further damage. Our experienced team is committed to providing exceptional craftsmanship and outstanding customer service. Let us help you protect your investment with our reliable concrete repair services.

faq.question: How do I know if my concrete needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs of concrete damage include cracks, chips, spalling, and settling. If you notice any of these issues, it's important to have your concrete inspected by a professional.

faq.question: How much does concrete repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of concrete repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of repair required. We offer free estimates and will provide a detailed breakdown of all costs involved.

faq.question: How long will the repair last?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, our concrete repairs can last for many years. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure long-lasting performance.

services.name: Stamped Concrete
services.shortDescription: Add elegance and style with decorative stamped concrete.
services.description: Transform your ordinary concrete surfaces into stunning works of art with stamped concrete from Total Concrete Services, INC. We offer a wide variety of patterns and colors to create unique and eye-catching driveways, patios, walkways, and more. Stamped concrete is a cost-effective way to achieve the look of natural stone, brick, or tile without the high cost and maintenance. Our experienced team meticulously prepares the site, pours the concrete, and applies the chosen pattern using specialized stamps. We then add color hardeners and sealers to enhance the beauty and durability of the surface. Whether you're looking to add curb appeal to your home in Seven Oaks or create a luxurious outdoor living space in Riviera/Westchester, stamped concrete is an excellent choice. We are committed to providing exceptional craftsmanship and outstanding customer service. Let us help you create a stunning and durable stamped concrete surface that will enhance your property for years to come.
benefits: Wide variety of patterns and colors

faq.question: What types of stamped concrete patterns do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide variety of patterns, including brick, stone, slate, and tile. We can also create custom patterns to match your specific needs and preferences.

faq.question: How much does stamped concrete cost?
faq.answer: The cost of stamped concrete depends on the size of the project, the chosen pattern, and the complexity of the design. We offer free estimates and will provide a detailed breakdown of all costs involved.

faq.question: How long will stamped concrete last?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, stamped concrete can last for 25 years or more. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure long-lasting performance.

services.name: Concrete Demolition
services.shortDescription: Safe and efficient concrete demolition and removal services.
services.description: Need to remove old, damaged, or unwanted concrete? Total Concrete Services, INC provides safe and efficient concrete demolition and removal services throughout Bakersfield. We have the equipment and expertise to handle any size project, from small residential demolition to large commercial tear-outs. Our team carefully assesses the site, implements safety protocols, and uses specialized equipment to break up and remove the concrete. We then haul away the debris and dispose of it responsibly. Whether you're removing an old driveway in Oleander-Sunset or demolishing a concrete structure in Seven Oaks, we can provide a cost-effective and reliable solution. We are committed to providing exceptional service and minimizing disruption to your property. Let us handle the dirty work so you can focus on your next project.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for concrete demolition?
faq.answer: In some cases, a permit may be required for concrete demolition. We can help you determine if a permit is needed and assist with the application process.

faq.question: How much does concrete demolition cost?
faq.answer: The cost of concrete demolition depends on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free estimates and will provide a detailed breakdown of all costs involved.

faq.question: How long does concrete demolition take?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide a detailed schedule during the initial consultation.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Total Concrete Services did an amazing job on our new driveway! They were professional, efficient, and the quality of the work is outstanding. Our old asphalt driveway was cracked and crumbling, and they completely transformed our curb appeal. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: We hired Total Concrete to pour a slab for our new shed. They showed up on time, prepped the area well, and the slab is perfectly level. There was a small delay due to weather, but they communicated clearly throughout the process. Would use them again.

reviews.name: Jessica K.
reviews.text: Our new stamped concrete patio is absolutely beautiful! The crew at Total Concrete Services helped us choose the perfect pattern and color to match our backyard. The attention to detail was impressive, and they cleaned up everything thoroughly when they were finished. We love spending time on our new patio!

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: Total Concrete Services poured the foundation for our new home, and we couldn't be happier with the results. They were very knowledgeable and answered all of our questions. The foundation is solid and level, and we have complete confidence in their work. Great local company!

reviews.name: Linda P.
reviews.text: We had some cracks in our driveway, and Total Concrete Services did a great job repairing them. The repairs are seamless, and they sealed the driveway to prevent further damage. The price was reasonable, and the service was excellent.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: Total Concrete Services removed an old concrete patio for us. They were quick, efficient, and left the area clean and tidy. Very professional and easy to work with.
